# CAMS services Ltd
# https://www.camsservices.co.uk

> UK chaperone service and chaperone services for children in care, contact transport, school runs and SEND support.

CAMS services Ltd provides professional chaperone services and a safeguarding-first chaperone service for local authorities, schools, foster agencies and families. We also deliver child transport, youth mentoring, family support and SEND support across the UK.

## Chaperone services (priority)

- [Chaperone services UK guide](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/chaperone-services-uk): What chaperone services include, commissioning and safeguarding standards
- [Chaperone & community transport](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/community): Contact centre transport, school runs and community access
- [Make a referral](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/referral): Commission chaperone service cover

## Other services

- [Mentoring and coaching](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/mentoring): One-to-one youth mentoring
- [SEN and education support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/sen): SEND and school engagement support
- [Family support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/routine): Family communication and routines
- [All services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services)

## Insights

- [Child transport services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/child-transport-services-uk): Safe transport for children in care and SEND
- [Contact centre transport](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/contact-centre-transport): Court-ordered contact journeys
- [School transport support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/school-transport-support-semh): SEMH-friendly school runs
- [Blog index](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog): All commissioning guides

## Policies

- [Policies and safeguarding](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/policies)
- [FAQ](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/faq)
- [Contact](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/contact)
